shared_pathways.mechanobiology_relevance: PRIMARY — adherens junctions are mechanosensing hubs where Hippo pathway is regulated by junction integrity and mechanical force. YAP/TAZ nuclear exclusion controlled here.
shared_pathways.epigenomics_relevance: EP300 at adherens junctions = site where mechanical YAP activation meets the H3K27ac-writing HAT machinery

interactions.validation: NEAR_CERTAIN — canonical Piezo1 downstream RhoA-ROCK axis
VERY_HIGH — core super-enhancer condensate complex components
HIGH — supports sequential H3K27me3 erasure then H3K27ac writing
HIGH — MRTF-A directly recruits EP300 to CaRG-box mechanoenhancers
HIGH — YAP1 recruits EP300 to TEAD mechanoenhancers

hub_protein.rationale: EP300 (p300 HAT) is the central hub connecting all mechanosensitive regulators to H3K27ac writing at enhancers. Interacts with: YAP1 (0.692), BRD4 (0.988), MRTFA (0.710), KDM6B (0.754), CAMK2A (0.908), SRF (0.408). ALL mechanosensory pathways converge on EP300 for enhancer activation.
hub_protein.mechanobiological_significance: p300 writes H3K27ac — the defining mark of active enhancers. Multiple mechanical signal inputs (YAP, MRTF, Piezo1-CaMKII) converge on p300, making it the 'epigenetic transducer' of mechanical force at mechanoenhancers.

string_interactions.piezo1_note: PIEZO1 is an ion channel; STRING interactions with nuclear proteins are indirect via Ca2+→CAMK2A (0.908 with EP300) and Ca2+→RHOA→ROCK1 (0.999). No direct PIEZO1-EP300 or PIEZO1-YAP1 interaction expected or found.

queries_performed.query: KDM6B H3K27me3 enhancer activation epigenetics mechanical

pubmed_cooccurrence.conclusion: All four primary knowledge gaps confirmed by absence of PubMed co-occurrence. The specific combinations (YAP+EP300+H3K27ac+mechanoenhancer; Piezo1+p300+enhancer) have zero literature coverage.

quantitative_checks.rationale: Ca2+ influx (<1s) → CaMKII activation (<30s) → EP300 phosphorylation/activation (1-10 min) → H3K27ac deposition at nucleosomes (5-30 min). Total: 10-40 min, within 60-min window.
Supralinear condensate growth from 4x YAP concentration increase is quantitatively consistent with cooperative phase separation models.

quantitative_checks.check: KDM6B H3K27me3 demethylation timescale vs accessibility kinetics
quantitative_checks.verdict: CONSISTENT with hours-scale memory, not rapid response
quantitative_checks.rationale: KDM6B mediates sustained epigenetic reprogramming, not the acute accessibility change. Consistent with slow-phase mechanoepigenetic memory (Tayler 2026).

quantitative_checks.check: MRTF-A nuclear translocation vs ECM stiffness
quantitative_checks.rationale: MRTF nuclear translocation at intermediate timescale — fits the mechanoenhancer activation window from Cosgrove 2025.

bridge_validation_summary.bridge: YAP1 → EP300 → H3K27ac at TEAD mechanoenhancers
Piezo1 → Ca2+ → CaMKII → EP300 → H3K27ac (rapid pre-priming)
MRTF-A → EP300 → H3K27ac at CaRG-box mechanoenhancers
bridge_validation_summary.kegg_evidence: SRF targets overlap with mechanoenhancer CaRG motifs

bridge_validation_summary.bridge: YAP-BRD4 condensate size proportional to ECM stiffness at mechanoenhancers
bridge_validation_summary.kegg_evidence: hsa04519 (adherens junction) connects YAP to EP300

phase_1.name: Rapid Piezo1 Pre-priming
phase_1.pathway: ECM force → Piezo1 → Ca2+ → CaMKII (STRING: 0.908 with EP300) → EP300 activation → H3K27ac at mechanoenhancers
phase_1.prediction: H3K27ac detectable at mechanoenhancers within 15 min of ECM stiffness change, before YAP nuclear entry

phase_2.name: Sustained YAP/MRTF Amplification
phase_2.pathway: YAP nuclear (STRING YAP1-EP300: 0.692; YAP1-BRD4: 0.691) → BRD4-MED1 condensate at H3K27ac-primed mechanoenhancers + MRTF nuclear → EP300 at CaRG-box elements (STRING: 0.710) + KDM6B → residual H3K27me3 erasure (STRING: 0.754 with EP300)
phase_2.prediction: BRD4 condensate assembly at mechanoenhancers tracks YAP nuclear concentration; CaRG-box mechanoenhancers activated by MRTF independently of TEAD program
